시편 48:1.content: Great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised, in the city of our God, in his holy mountain.

시편 48:2.content: Beautiful in elevation, the joy of the whole earth, is Mount Zion, on the north sides, the city of the great King.

시편 48:3.content: God has shown himself in her citadels as a refuge.

시편 48:4.content: For, behold, the kings assembled themselves, they passed by together.

시편 48:5.content: They saw it, then they were amazed. They were dismayed. They hurried away.

시편 48:6.content: Trembling took hold of them there, pain, as of a woman in travail.

시편 48:7.content: With the east wind, you break the ships of Tarshish.

시편 48:8.content: As we have heard, so we have seen, in the city of Yahweh of Armies, in the city of our God. God will establish it forever.

시편 48:9.content: We have thought about your loving kindness, God, in the middle of your temple.

시편 48:10.content: As is your name, God, so is your praise to the ends of the earth. Your right hand is full of righteousness.

시편 48:11.content: Let Mount Zion be glad! Let the daughters of Judah rejoice because of your judgments.

시편 48:12.content: Walk about Zion, and go around her. Number its towers.

시편 48:13.content: Notice her bulwarks. Consider her palaces, that you may tell it to the next generation.

시편 48:14.content: For this God is our God forever and ever. He will be our guide even to death.
